retry_reason: The refcount operation either occurs or not based on the state's flags; the condition is not transient, so retrying is pointless.
contract_summary: Cache a reference to an extent_state that has EXTENT_LOCK_BITS | EXTENT_BOUNDARY set. Increments the refcount and stores the pointer in *cached_ptr if the pointer was previously NULL and the state matches the flags. The caller takes ownership of the reference; when the cached pointer is no longer needed, the caller must call the corresponding put (e.g., extent_state_put) to release the reference. This wrapper is a conditional get that only acquires the reference under specific state conditions.
